requested_by: Dr. Priya Nair, VP Quality & Patient Safety
question: Why did sepsis bundle-compliance dip for the cardiology service line last Tuesday?
metric_label: Sepsis bundle compliance by service line, daily

upstream_models.description: Patient encounters landed by Fivetran from Clarity Health SQL Server. Includes encounter_date, department_id, and admission_type.
Vital signs and sepsis screening flags from Clarity Health. Includes sepsis_alert_flag, lactate_drawn, and blood_culture_drawn indicators.
Clinical orders from the EHR. Includes antibiotic_administered, order_timestamp, and encounter linkage. Used to verify bundle elements completed within required windows.
Department master with service_line classification (Cardiology, Pulmonology, Medicine, ICU, etc.) from Clarity Health configuration tables.
